headline: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Delivered a 39,000x Return Since 1965. He Still Tells Most Investors to Buy Index Funds Instead.
summary: Although Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK-B) has compiled the single best long-run track record in modern markets, the man who built it spends most of his shareholder letters telling you not to try this at home. On Wall Street, that contradiction has hardened into one of investing’s most durable patterns. From 1965 to 2025, Berkshire posted a ... Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Delivered a 39,000x Return Since 1965. He Still Tells Most Investors to Buy Index Funds Instead.

headline: Bank Of America Links Crypto ETF Exposure With Gen Z Money Habits
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) has disclosed significant holdings in cryptocurrency-related ETFs and recent adjustments to those positions. The bank has also released new Better Money Habits research on Gen Z financial behavior, including savings patterns and financial independence. These updates highlight how a major US bank is approaching digital assets and younger customers' money habits at the same time. For you as an investor, BAC’s ETF disclosure gives a clearer view of how a large,...
